calendar.matters:
Petition To Designate The Principal Place Of Trust Administration, Trust Beneficiary, And Trustee.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milla Lvovich for and with (petitioner) Annie Marsh.

Ms. Lvovich reported that no copy of the trust can be found, the estate is being administered in San Mateo County, that the trust consists or real property located in Lake County, California and in Louisiana and that per code 17005 feels that San Francisco is the correct venue for this case as it was the principal place of business for the trustor. The court expressed concern regarding the lack of a trust document. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alavarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Choi. (Not Reported)
